source: design-interview repo self-inventory (core/design-tells.md, core/interview.md, SKILL.md, templates/concept-sheet.md, src/audit.js, src/geometry.js)
license: MIT (own repo, package.json; no LICENSE file present)
notes: Inventory of existing coverage for dedupe, not new research. All 18 tells (L1-L4, C1-C4, T1-T5, S1-S5) plus SKILL.md phase-gate rules and concept-sheet template disciplines. Lane assignment per design-tells.md '감사 사용법': static machine lane = C1,T1,T2,T4,S5 (src/audit.js); visual machine lane = L1,S3 (src/geometry.js, --visual, puppeteer); LLM lane = L2-L4, S1/S2/S4, T3, T5. COVERAGE GAP: C2/C3/C4 are defined as tells but appear in neither the machine-lane list nor the explicit LLM-checklist enumeration in design-tells.md L42 and SKILL.md Phase 5 step 2 — they are de facto LLM-lane via the Phase 3 generation rule only. Existing tells are NEGATIVE (forbidden patterns); positive principles already present are limited to: role-named 3-5 color palette, named fonts with size/line-height, declared density policy, one-role-per-section, single conversion goal, intentional asymmetry >=1, importance-differentiated layout (L1 substitute), single-accent-color (C3 substitute). Synthesizer should treat anything matching these as duplicate. Also out of scope for design principles but present in SKILL.md: SSRF intake guard, no-AI-detection-evasion clause, benchmark regression gate (tests/quality/baseline.json).

principles.name: no-purple-gradient (C1)
principles.rule: No purple-to-blue gradient backgrounds, especially hero. Replace with a single concept-palette color or restrained same-family tones.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells C1; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 5 static machine audit.
principles.machineCheckable: yes — static lane: any linear-gradient() containing a hex stop with HSL hue in [230,300] and saturation >= 0.25 fails.

principles.name: no-default-glassmorphism (C2)
principles.rule: No translucent blur cards without reason. Surface separation via 1px border or background lightness difference instead.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells C2; Phase 3 generation rule. NOTE: not listed in any audit lane enumeration (gap).
principles.machineCheckable: no current lane (backdrop-filter+alpha background would be parser-checkable; not implemented).

principles.name: single-accent-color (C3)
principles.rule: No different-colored icon background per feature. One accent color across the page.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells C3; Phase 3 generation rule. NOTE: not listed in any audit lane enumeration (gap).
principles.machineCheckable: no current lane (distinct accent-hue count would be parser-checkable; not implemented).

principles.name: shadow-restraint (C4)
principles.rule: No identical box-shadow on every element. Shadow only on the one element class that must float.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells C4; Phase 3 generation rule. NOTE: not listed in any audit lane enumeration (gap).
principles.machineCheckable: no current lane (identical box-shadow declaration count would be parser-checkable; not implemented).

principles.name: importance-differentiated-layout (L1)
principles.rule: No 3-column uniform card grid (icon + title + 2-line description repeated). Size and place items by importance: one large, the rest as a list.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells L1; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 5 visual machine audit.
principles.machineCheckable: yes — visual lane (puppeteer): >=3 visible siblings >=60x60px with identical width/height (+-2px), same row top (+-2px), equal horizontal pitch (+-3px) fails.

principles.name: break-center-alignment (L2)
principles.rule: Not every section center-aligned single column. At least one body section left-aligned or asymmetric 2-column.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells L2; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 4 screenshot self-review + Phase 5 LLM checklist.
principles.machineCheckable: no — LLM lane (S3 geometry check partially overlaps via 80% center-aligned text-block ratio).

principles.name: varied-section-density (L3)
principles.rule: Sections must not repeat identical padding and identical title/subtitle/body structure. Vary density per section; one narrow section breaks the rhythm.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells L3; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 4 screenshot self-review + Phase 5 LLM checklist.
principles.machineCheckable: no — LLM lane (section padding variance would be geometry-checkable; not implemented).

principles.name: no-hero-formula (L4)
principles.rule: No giant-title + subtitle + 2 CTA buttons + right illustration hero formula. First screen derives from the concept sheet's structure answer.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells L4; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 4 screenshot self-review + Phase 5 LLM checklist.
principles.machineCheckable: no — LLM lane.

principles.name: no-emoji-bullets (T1)
principles.rule: No pictographic bullets (sparkles/rocket/bulb). Reduce bullets overall; prefer prose or numbered lists.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells T1; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 5 static machine audit.
principles.machineCheckable: yes — static lane: any li/h1-h6/button whose stripped text starts or ends with \p{Extended_Pictographic} fails.

principles.name: no-hype-adjectives (T2)
principles.rule: Hype lexicon forbidden (ko: 혁신적인/완벽한/강력한/손쉽게/경험하세요/극대화/새로운 패러다임/최적화된; en: seamless/effortless/revolutionary/game-changing/supercharge/unleash/elevate your/transform your/innovative solution). Replace with the claim's concrete number or behavior.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells T2; Phase 3 copy rule + Phase 5 static machine audit.
principles.machineCheckable: yes — static lane: case-insensitive lexicon scan over tag-stripped body text.

principles.name: sentence-case-headings (T3)
principles.rule: English headings in sentence case, never mechanical Title Case.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells T3; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 5 LLM checklist.
principles.machineCheckable: no — LLM lane (capitalized-word ratio in headings would be parser-checkable; not implemented).

principles.name: no-staccato-triads (T4)
principles.rule: No 'Simple. Powerful. Fast.' style 3+ consecutive short fragments in a heading. Write one full sentence or keep one fragment.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells T4; Phase 3 copy rule + Phase 5 static machine audit.
principles.machineCheckable: yes — static lane: heading text split on [.!] into >=3 segments each <=2 words fails.

principles.name: no-faq-padding (T5)
principles.rule: FAQ section only for real purchase objections; if none exist, delete the section entirely.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells T5; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 5 LLM checklist.
principles.machineCheckable: no — LLM lane (semantic judgment).

principles.name: no-fabricated-testimonials (S1)
principles.rule: No testimonial cards without verifiable source. If there are no real testimonials, the section does not exist.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells S1; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 5 LLM checklist.
principles.machineCheckable: no — LLM lane (truth judgment).

principles.name: no-placeholder-logo-walls (S2)
principles.rule: No fake 'trusted by' logo walls. Same omission rule as testimonials.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells S2; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 5 LLM checklist.
principles.machineCheckable: no — LLM lane.

principles.name: intentional-asymmetry (S3)
principles.rule: Spacing/sizes must not be mathematically uniform everywhere; include at least one deliberate asymmetry; fewer than 80% of text blocks may render center-aligned.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells S3 + SKILL.md Phase 3 explicit rule ('의도적 비대칭 최소 1곳') + Phase 5 visual machine audit.
principles.evidence: core/design-tells.md S3; SKILL.md Phase 3; src/geometry.js pageAnalyzer s3
principles.machineCheckable: yes (negative side) — visual lane: >=4 visible text blocks (h1-h6,p,li,button,figcaption) with >=80% computed text-align:center fails. The positive '>=1 asymmetry' itself is build discipline, not separately measured.

principles.name: real-imagery-or-typography (S4)
principles.rule: No undraw-style stock illustration or meaningless 3D blobs. Use real product screenshots; if none exist, solve the section typographically.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells S4; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 5 LLM checklist.
principles.machineCheckable: no — LLM lane.

principles.name: hierarchy-varied-border-radius (S5)
principles.rule: Not all elements with the same border-radius (especially 12-16px). Vary radius by element hierarchy, or use 0.
principles.buildApplication: design-tells S5; Phase 3 generation rule + Phase 5 static machine audit.
principles.machineCheckable: yes — static lane: >=3 non-zero border-radius declarations all identical fails.

principles.name: interview-before-design gate
principles.rule: No HTML/CSS is generated before the concept is locked (Phase 2 approval). Design decisions come from the user interview, never from AI defaults alone.
principles.buildApplication: SKILL.md core principle 1 + Phase 2 hard gate (process discipline, not a page property).
principles.machineCheckable: no — orchestration gate.

principles.name: six-dimension-clarity-gating
principles.rule: Interview clarity measured on 6 weighted dimensions: audience 0.20, mood 0.20, brand 0.10, structure 0.20, conversion 0.20, reference 0.10. Build proceeds only at weighted score >= 0.80 (--quick: average 0.75 over audience/mood/conversion only; greenfield reference starts at 0.5).
principles.buildApplication: core/interview.md scoring model; SKILL.md Phase 1 gating.
principles.machineCheckable: no — LLM-scored rubric with defined numeric thresholds.

principles.name: one-question-weakest-dimension
principles.rule: One question per interview round, aimed at the lowest-scoring dimension; show the score table each round; offer 2-4 multiple-choice options that act as designer suggestions.
principles.buildApplication: core/interview.md 라운드 운영; SKILL.md Phase 1 rules + core principle 2.
principles.evidence: core/interview.md 라운드 운영; SKILL.md 핵심 원칙 2
principles.machineCheckable: no — interview process rule.

principles.name: audience-as-arrival-context
principles.rule: Audience is defined as arrival path + cognitive state at arrival in one sentence ('where do they click this link from?'), never demographics.
principles.buildApplication: core/interview.md audience question design; feeds concept sheet audience row.
principles.evidence: core/interview.md 차원별 질문 설계 요령 — audience
principles.machineCheckable: no.

principles.name: contrast-forced-mood
principles.rule: Mood elicited by forcing a trade-off ('luxury vs friendly — which do you give up?') and recorded as 2-3 adjectives plus a contrast statement of the form 'X but not Y'.
principles.buildApplication: core/interview.md mood question design; concept sheet mood row.
principles.evidence: core/interview.md mood row + 질문 설계 요령
principles.machineCheckable: no.

principles.name: above-fold-priority-three
principles.rule: Structure dimension elicited as ranked priorities: 'if only three things remain visible without scrolling?'. This answer, not a formula, generates the hero.
principles.buildApplication: core/interview.md structure question; design-tells L4 substitute; concept sheet structure row.
principles.machineCheckable: no.

principles.name: single-conversion-goal
principles.rule: Exactly one conversion action and one CTA copy direction per page. Plural conversion goals are immediately forced singular: 'if you measured only one click, which?'.
principles.buildApplication: core/interview.md conversion dimension; concept sheet conversion row.
principles.machineCheckable: no current lane (distinct CTA-target count would be parser-checkable; not implemented).

principles.name: reference-with-reason
principles.rule: Reference dimension requires >=1 real URL/product plus WHY it looked good; in --deep, collect both liked and disliked examples — disliked examples set design-tells priority.
principles.buildApplication: core/interview.md reference dimension; informs concept sheet do-not list.
principles.machineCheckable: no.

principles.name: source-confirmation-over-questions
principles.rule: Dimensions already inferable from the slop source are confirmed with cited evidence instead of asked; confirmations may be batched in one round (they are verification, not questions).
principles.buildApplication: core/interview.md 소스 선반영 규칙; SKILL.md Phase 1.
principles.machineCheckable: no.

principles.name: explicit-defaults-declaration
principles.rule: If the user says 'just build it', the designer's defaults for each unresolved dimension are declared explicitly before proceeding — never silently assumed.
principles.buildApplication: SKILL.md Phase 1 last rule.
principles.machineCheckable: no.

principles.name: concept-sheet-lock
principles.rule: Interview output condenses into one approved concept sheet; after approval the build cannot deviate. Feedback is first judged in/out of sheet: in-sheet fixes apply immediately, out-of-sheet changes require sheet revision approval first.
principles.buildApplication: SKILL.md Phase 2 + Phase 4 feedback rule; templates/concept-sheet.md.
principles.machineCheckable: no — process gate (sheet field presence is template-checkable).

principles.name: one-line-direction-statement
principles.rule: Concept opens with a single direction sentence of the form 'looks like X and reads like Y' ('○○처럼 보이고 ○○처럼 읽히는 페이지').
principles.buildApplication: templates/concept-sheet.md 방향 선언; SKILL.md Phase 2 format.
principles.machineCheckable: no.

principles.name: role-named-palette-3-5
principles.rule: Palette is 3-5 colors, each with an explicit role (background / body text / accent / border). Single accent color principle (ties to C3).
principles.buildApplication: templates/concept-sheet.md 시각 언어 — 팔레트; SKILL.md Phase 2.
principles.machineCheckable: no current lane (distinct color count in built CSS would be parser-checkable; not implemented).

principles.name: named-fonts-with-metrics
principles.rule: Typography specified with real font names: heading font + weight; body font + size + line-height. No generic 'clean sans-serif'.
principles.buildApplication: templates/concept-sheet.md 시각 언어 — 타이포; SKILL.md Phase 2.
principles.machineCheckable: no — concept-sheet field discipline; built-page font-family presence is parser-checkable but not audited.

principles.name: declared-density-policy
principles.rule: Whitespace density is declared up front as one of dense/standard/sparse ('빽빽/표준/성김') WITH rationale, and the build follows it.
principles.buildApplication: templates/concept-sheet.md 시각 언어 — 밀도·여백; ties to L3 varied density.
principles.machineCheckable: no.

principles.name: one-role-per-section
principles.rule: Section structure is listed top-to-bottom and every section is assigned exactly one role ('역할: 단 하나'). A section without a single role does not exist.
principles.buildApplication: templates/concept-sheet.md 섹션 구조; SKILL.md Phase 2.
principles.machineCheckable: no.

principles.name: specified-copy-voice
principles.rule: Copy voice pinned before build: sentence endings (어미), distance/formality (거리감), sentence length. Source claims are rewritten in that voice.
principles.buildApplication: templates/concept-sheet.md 카피 보이스; SKILL.md Phase 3 copy rule.
principles.machineCheckable: no.

principles.name: per-concept-risk-list
principles.rule: Concept sheet names 3-5 design-tells most dangerous for THIS concept ('하지 않을 것'); these get priority re-check at every Phase 4 preview.
principles.buildApplication: templates/concept-sheet.md 하지 않을 것; design-tells.md 감사 사용법 last line.
principles.machineCheckable: no.

principles.name: claim-freeze
principles.rule: Prices, quantities, percentages, durations, and features extracted at intake are immutable assets: meaning, numbers, polarity, and causality survive the redesign unchanged. Delivery includes a claim-by-claim diff table against the source.
principles.buildApplication: SKILL.md Phase 0 (node src/cli.js intake --json) + concept sheet 보존 클레임 section + Phase 5 step 4 대조표.
principles.evidence: SKILL.md Phase 0/Phase 5; templates/concept-sheet.md 보존 클레임; src/intake.js
principles.machineCheckable: partial — extraction is deterministic (intake lane); the built-page diff is currently an LLM/manual table, not coded.

principles.name: single-file-no-framework
principles.rule: Deliverable is one HTML file with inline or single CSS; no framework, no build chain, no unrequested dependencies — it renders when opened directly.
principles.buildApplication: SKILL.md Phase 3 first rule + '하지 않는 것' list.
principles.machineCheckable: yes in principle (parser: no external <script src>/framework artifacts); not currently audited.

principles.name: screenshot-self-review-before-user
principles.rule: Before showing the user, capture desktop + mobile full-page PNGs (cli shot) and visually verify (a) concept-sheet visual language: palette/density/structure and (b) layout tells L2/L3/L4. Violations are fixed before the user sees the page. If puppeteer is missing, skip and report the skip.
principles.buildApplication: SKILL.md Phase 4 스크린샷 자기검수; node src/cli.js shot.
principles.machineCheckable: capture is deterministic (src/screenshot.js); the visual review itself is LLM-judged.

principles.name: inert-preview-review-loop
principles.rule: Review happens in an inert preview: scripts/inline handlers/javascript: URLs stripped, CSP script-src 'none', no-script radio-hack 3-state toggle (rewritten/original/both) against the slop source, review chrome dsiv- prefixed with !important.
principles.buildApplication: SKILL.md Phase 4; node src/cli.js preview --against; src/preview.js.
principles.machineCheckable: yes — implementation covered by unit tests; not a page-design rule but a review-safety rule.

principles.name: machine-audit-delivery-gate
principles.rule: Delivery is blocked while `node src/cli.js audit <built.html> --visual` exits 1; any failed tell sends the build back to Phase 3. LLM self-grading may NOT substitute machine results. The visual lane degrades to static-only on exactly one error (ERR_PUPPETEER_MISSING); any other visual error fails the audit.
principles.buildApplication: SKILL.md Phase 5 step 1; src/cli.js exit-code discipline; design-tells.md 'fail 1개라도 있으면 납품 불가'.
principles.evidence: SKILL.md Phase 5; core/design-tells.md L46; CLAUDE.md exit-code section
principles.machineCheckable: yes — exit code 1 = not deliverable; deterministic.

principles.name: no-double-scoring
principles.rule: Each tell is judged in exactly one lane: a tell covered by a machine lane is removed from the LLM Phase 5 checklist. Promoting a tell to a machine lane updates design-tells.md, SKILL.md, and the benchmark baseline together.
principles.buildApplication: core/design-tells.md 감사 사용법; CLAUDE.md invariant.
principles.machineCheckable: organizational invariant — enforced by docs + tests/quality/baseline.json, not at page level.

principles.name: external-copy-score-audit
principles.rule: If patina is installed, run `patina --score` on the built page's body text and report the AI-copy score at delivery; otherwise audit copy manually against the T-series tells.
principles.buildApplication: SKILL.md Phase 5 step 3.
principles.machineCheckable: yes when patina present (external deterministic scorer); manual fallback otherwise.
